data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of auto-start settings, specifically that the host must join first. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific setting. The linked use case details the process of creating a Zoom meeting but does not address whether the auto-start settings are configured as required, indicating a gap in the validation process.
gaps: Auto-start settings (host must join first) not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
